description: Wagner Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Buckeye, AZ. There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Washington Activity Center
description: Washington Activity Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Phoenix, AZ. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Westbrook Village
description: Westbrook Village is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peoria, AZ. There are 16 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

name: Western Star Park
description: Come play pickleball at Western Star Park in Phoenix, AZ! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Windgate Ranch
description: Come play pickleball at Windgate Ranch in Scottsdale, AZ! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. The courts can be reserved.

name: Windrose Park
description: Windrose Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Peoria, AZ. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: YMCA Chris-town
description: YMCA Chris-town is a place to play pickleball in Phoenix, AZ. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, lights, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.
